faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about $ahim and how it works.

items.a: $ahim is an AI-powered investment intelligence platform for Arabic-speaking beginner investors. It provides stock scores, Shariah compliance checks, news analysis, and risk indicators for MENA markets.

Yes. The Free plan gives you stock search, investment scores, basic news, and halal screening with no credit card required. Pro features like ARIMA forecasts and portfolio allocation are unlocked with a Pro subscription.

items.q: How does the Halal screening work?
items.a: We source halal classifications from Musaffa and apply AAOIFI standards. Results show Halal, Non-Halal, or Purification Required. Final verification remains the user's responsibility.
We cover major MENA markets including Tadawul (Saudi), EGX (Egypt), ADX and DFM (UAE), and major US-listed stocks relevant to Arabic-speaking investors.
No. $ahim provides independent informational analysis only. All scores, forecasts, and data are for educational purposes and are not licensed investment advice.

riskWizard.title: Risk Tolerance Wizard

resultDescription.conservative: You prefer capital preservation and stable returns over high growth.
resultDescription.moderate: You balance growth potential with acceptable risk exposure.
resultDescription.aggressive: You seek maximum growth and can tolerate significant market volatility.

simulation.title: Live Risk Simulation
simulation.score: Estimated score: {score}/100 based on {answered}/{total} answered questions

riskWizard.disclaimer: This result is for educational purposes only. It does not constitute investment advice. Please consult a qualified financial advisor before making investment decisions.
riskWizard.howCalculatedText: Your score is calculated from 6 factors: investment horizon (25%), maximum acceptable drawdown (20%), age (15%), financial knowledge (15%), income stability (15%), and patience during downturns (10%).

questions.q1: What is your investment time horizon?
questions.q2: What is the maximum portfolio loss you could accept in one year?
questions.q4: How would you rate your investment knowledge?
questions.q6: If your portfolio dropped 20%, how long would you wait before selling?

purification.title: Dividend Purification Calculator
purification.noCleanup: No purification required for this stock.
purification.formulaText: The purification amount equals your dividend income multiplied by the stock's non-halal income ratio (interest income / total revenue). This portion should be donated to charity.
purification.disclaimer: This calculator is for guidance only. Consult a qualified Islamic finance scholar for your specific situation.
purification.unavailable: Ratio unavailable — please verify with your data source.
purification.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid positive amount.

zakatCalculator.title: Zakat Calculator
zakatCalculator.belowNisab: Your net portfolio is below the nisab threshold. No Zakat is due.
zakatCalculator.formulaText: Zakat = 2.5% of net wealth (portfolio − liabilities) if it equals or exceeds the nisab (85 grams of gold at today's price), and you have held it for one lunar year (hawl).
zakatCalculator.disclaimer: This calculator provides an estimate. Consult a qualified Islamic scholar for your specific situation.
zakatCalculator.signInGate: Sign in for free to save your Zakat calculation results.

onboarding.title: Build your investor profile
onboarding.subtitle: A short setup checklist helps Sahim personalize market news, halal filters, risk signals, and dashboard guidance around your actual situation.
onboarding.saveError: We could not save your profile. Please try again.
onboarding.disclaimer: Sahim uses this information to personalize educational insights. It is not licensed investment advice.

identity.title: Basic profile
identity.body: Start with the information needed for language, currency, market context, and user identity.

suitability.title: Investment context
suitability.body: These fields mirror common investor-profile factors such as objective, experience, time horizon, liquidity needs, and reliance on invested funds.

preferences.title: Markets and interests
preferences.body: Choose the markets, sectors, and news rhythm Sahim should prioritize in your dashboard.

risk.title: Risk wizard
risk.body: Answer the risk behavior questions. Sahim reuses your age, experience, and time horizon from the previous step so you do not repeat yourself.
risk.derived: Already covered: age range, investment experience, and time horizon are pulled from your investment context.

review.title: Ready to personalize
review.body: Review the profile summary. Saving will update your dashboard and store your risk profile.

guide.title: How to use Sahim
guide.subtitle: A short walkthrough to help you start from the right place and move through the dashboard confidently.

start.label: Start here
start.title: Begin with your investment profile
start.body: Use the Risk Wizard first so Sahim can frame risk signals around your tolerance. This gives the rest of the dashboard better context.

search.label: Search
search.title: Use search to jump anywhere
search.body: The top search bar finds Sahim pages, tools, and services. Search for halal checks, forecasts, zakat, sectors, or stock pages.

services.label: Services
services.title: Open tools from the sidebar
services.body: The sidebar keeps every Sahim service one click away. Free tools are available immediately, while Pro tools show upgrade prompts when needed.

insights.label: Insights
insights.title: Read the dashboard from top to bottom
insights.body: Start with hot news, then scan KPIs, forecasts, portfolio allocation, sector performance, and risk. Use ticker clicks to update the forecast.

support.label: Support
support.title: Ask the support agent
support.body: Use the floating support chat when you are unsure where to go. It can explain Sahim services and guide you through the website.

market.title: Market pulse is active
market.body: Your dashboard is tracking hot market signals and watchlist news.

halal.title: Halal checks are available
halal.body: Open any stock to review its latest Shariah compliance status.

zakat.title: Zakat reminder
zakat.body: Use the Zakat Calculator to estimate your portfolio obligation.

support.title: Sahim Support Agent
support.subtitle: Gemini-powered website assistant
support.welcome: Hi, I can help you understand Sahim services, find pages, and use the dashboard.
support.fallback: I could not reach the assistant right now, but I can still help you navigate Sahim services.
support.disclaimer: Support answers are informational and are not licensed investment advice.
